summary: Ops cycle complete: disk extended, MTASK-2031 executed (qwen2.5-coder:14b live), duplicate ollama container removed.

actions.detail: Pulled qwen2.5-coder:14b (9.0 GB), validated /api/generate (HTTP 200), updated MTASK-2026 chat shim default model, ran chat shim publish for live validation.
Stopped+removed redundant 'ollama' container (bridge net, no compose project, ad-hoc docker run with restart=unless-stopped). Kept 'mide-ollama' (host net, owns :11434).

current_state.worker_autopilot: stopped briefly for this commit; will resume after push

notes: Resource constraint resolved — only one ollama runtime now serving inference, freeing CPU/RAM/scheduler contention.
